## Why this fits Droidsmith

<!--
Droidsmith is a cross-platform open-source ADB GUI. We integrate well-known
open building blocks (UAD-NG lists, scrcpy, adb_client) rather than
re-implementing them. We deliberately avoid: telemetry-on-by-default,
paywalls, mobile/TV companion apps, ROM flashing.
-->
